mapper.select: SELECT rr.REPORT_ID AS reportId, rr.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, rr.REASON AS reason, rr.REG_DATE AS regDate, rr.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, b.BIZ_NAME AS bizName, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, r.CONTENT AS content, r.RATING AS rating, m.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM TB_REVIEW_REPORT rr JOIN TB_REVIEW r ON r.REVIEW_ID = rr.REVIEW_ID JOIN TB_PRODUCT p ON p.PRODUCT_ID = r.TARGET_ID JOIN TB_BUSINESS b ON b.BIZ_NO = rr.BIZ_NO JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON m.MEMBER_NO = r.MEMBER_NO WHERE rr.REPORTER_TYPE = 'BIZ' AND rr.STATUS_CD = 'PENDING' ORDER BY rr.REG_DATE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_REVIEW_REPORT SET REVIEW_ID = NULL WHERE REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId}
